title: Craftable Name Tag
description: Allows you to craft name tags!
body:
[<center>![CRAFTABLE NAME TAG](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/494de4568ba39231aff1036cb10d5de8eab5d421.png)</center>](https://modrinth.com/datapack/craft-nametag)

![Divider](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/divider_faded/Divider_05.png)

[<center>![Discord Button](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/social_buttons_icon/Discord-Button-64.png)](https://discord.gg/FVH3GaMHJz)
[![GitHub Button](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/social_buttons_icon/Github-Button-64.png)](https://github.com/T1taniumF0rge-Industries-Inc/craftables/tree/main/craft-nametag)
[![Modrinth Button](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/social_buttons_icon/Modrinth-Button-64.png)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/craft-nametag)
[![Ko-fi Button](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/social_buttons_icon/Kofi-Button-64.png)</center>](https://ko-fi.com/titan1um)

![Divider](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/divider_faded/Divider_05.png)

Allows you to craft name tags!

Use any metal nuggets you like (iron, gold or copper nuggets)!

![Craftable Name Tags](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83706d18bbe5021d88160dca78af99bb53aacc76.png)

![Divider](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/divider_faded/Divider_05.png)

# 💘 Support me!
To help me and make me develop more fascinating projects, share and recommend this datapack. Thank you so much!!!

You can also try my other projects [here](https://modrinth.com/user/Titan1um) or the projects me and Polr made [here](https://modrinth.com/organization/titan1um-x-polr)! :D
